{{Quote|With Tanda the Hutt in our control, our operations will run more smoothly in this sector.|[[Urai Fen]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption">''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]''</ref>}}
'''Tanda the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]''' was a [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] director who was in charge of part of [[Nal Hutta/Legends|Nal Hutta's]] imports and exports during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], he was kidnapped by the [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium]].
